zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Percy於1395年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，她的父親Sir Henry Percy31歲，母親Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys24歲。她於1404年與Sir John Clifford在英國諾福爾可費爾布利格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年10月26日在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普享年41歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Percy于1395年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Henry Percy31岁，母亲Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys24岁。她于1404年与Sir John Clifford在英国諾福爾可費爾布利格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年10月26日在英国英格兰達勒姆斯泰德洛普享年41岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Percy was born in 1395, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Henry Percy, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, was 24. She married Sir John Clifford in 1404, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 October 1436, in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Percy est née en 1395, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Percy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clifford en 1404, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1436, à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Percy 1395 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Percy 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys 24. Sie hat 1404 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England Sir John Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1436 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Percy è nata il nel 1395 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Percy, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Clifford nel 1404, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1436, nel Staindrop, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Staindrop, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Percyが1395年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Percyは31歳，母Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoysは24歳であった。1404年にイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググでSir John Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1436年10月26日にイギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップで41歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Percy(이)가 1395년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Percy(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 노르폴크 프브리그에서 Sir John Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Percy nasceu em 1395, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Percy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Clifford em 1404, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1436, em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Percy родилась в 1395 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Percy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clifford в 1404 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 октября 1436 г. в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Percy nació en 1395, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Percy, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Clifford en 1404, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1436, en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra.
